title: Multiplied Drops
description: Multiply all block drops with Multiplied Drops
body:
# Multiplied Drops Mod

**Multiplied Drops Mod** transforms Minecraft by letting you collect more from every block you break—multiply your drops and gather resources faster! Perfect for survival, building, or just causing a little chaos with friends.

## Features
- **Customizable Multipliers:** Control how many of each item you get from a block with the `/md` command:  
  - `/md on` — enable multiplied drops  
  - `/md off` — disable multiplied drops  
  - `/md reset` — reset multiplier to 1x  
  - `/md <value>` — set a custom multiplier  
  - `/md confirm` — confirm extremely high multipliers (warning: may lag)  
<!-- **Vanilla-Friendly:** Respects enchantments like Fortune and Silk Touch for fair drops.-->  
- **Perfect for Multiplayer:** Play with friends and speed up resource collection, or just have fun seeing stacks of items fall from a single block.  
- **Challenge Options:** Set multipliers for mini-games, server events, or just to experiment.  
- **Content Creation:** Great for recording videos, streaming, or building insane contraptions with lots of drops.  
- **Easy to Install:** Works in single-player or multiplayer; just install on the server for others to benefit.

## Why Download?
Multiplied Drops Mod adds a fresh layer of fun and efficiency to Minecraft. Whether you want to farm materials faster, prank your friends with massive drops, or just watch the chaos unfold, this mod makes every block more rewarding.

Turn ordinary blocks into resource gold mines and watch your inventory overflow!  

## Disclaimer: 
This mod is still in early stages of development and may have bugs.

**Currently noted bugs include:**  

- Blocks dropping even when the wrong tier tool is used

I’m working hard to fix bugs and add improvements, so thanks for your patience!
